subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
$Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. It would be great to continue the conversation and explore potential partnership opportunities.

We can offer the following windows next week for a 30-minute call:
- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

If one of those works for you, please send your preferred time and we can coordinate accordingly.

As for direct internal contact details, I’m not able to share internal email addresses, phone numbers, or directory information. Please use the contact information available on our public website for any additional outreach.

Best regards,
